top_signals.title: Chinese Oil Tanker U-Turns in Red Sea After Houthi Attack Threat
top_signals.summary: A very large crude carrier has made a U-turn in the southern Red Sea after warnings from Houthi rebels in Yemen that they would target ships heading to or from Saudi ports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Freedom of Ship Navigation takes Center Stage in International Affairs
top_signals.summary: The Middle East crisis cast a shadow over a diplomatic gathering in Southeast Asia on Tuesday, where foreign ministers voiced serious concern over renewed hostilities that add to uncertainty in a region grappling to manage tensions and conflicts…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines, China Scrum (again) in the South China Sea
top_signals.summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. will summon China's ambassador in Manila, his office said on Tuesday, hours after Manila's envoy in Beijing was similarly summoned following accusations by both sides of provoking tensions in the contested…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: LA’s $1.2 Billion Graffiti Towers Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy
top_signals.summary: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK Parliament begins inquiry into banking chokepoint for crypto businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The FDA made a big reversal in its cyclosporiasis probe, but it still thinks iceberg lettuce is to blame
top_signals.summary: The FDA's investigation into the source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak is causing confusion as companies and consumers alike navigate new updates.

top_signals.title: The Square Mile art gallery with amazing free exhibitions
top_signals.summary: This Square Mile gallery is hosting free exhibitions throughout the summer You might have noticed a group of twenty-something students and creative types gathering in an art gallery in No 1 Poultry recently – if you’ve wondered what’s going on there, the first bit of good news is you’re welcome to join in too.
